bird.name: 紅胸巨嘴鳥
bird.summary: 紅胸巨嘴鳥（學名：Ramphastos dicolorus）又名紅胸鵎鵼，是分佈在巴西東部及南部、巴拉圭東部及阿根廷東北部大西洋森林的巨嘴鳥。 紅胸巨嘴鳥是鵎鵼屬中最細小的物種之一，只重約350克。牠們的喙只長約10厘米，也是屬內最短的之一。牠們的身體上有一大片的紅色羽毛，但實…

relations.subject: 紅胸巨嘴鳥
relations.evidence: It primarily inhabits subtropical and tropical, sub-montane and montane forest, but also scrublands, savanna with trees, and plantations
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: 紅胸巨嘴鳥
relations.evidence: It primarily inhabits subtropical and tropical, sub-montane and montane forest, but also scrublands, savanna with trees, and plantations
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 紅胸巨嘴鳥
relations.evidence: It primarily inhabits subtropical and tropical, sub-montane and montane forest, but also scrublands, savanna with trees, and plantations
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
